context: Tests whether the agent correctly groups unrelated changes into separate commits, writes a plan before staging, uses conventional commit format with appropriate scopes and action verbs, and produces multiple commits rather than one large mixed commit.

checklist.name: Plan before staging
checklist.description: commit-plan.md exists and contains proposed commit groups with messages listed before any commits were made (the plan mentions files and messages, indicating pre-staging analysis)

checklist.name: Auth group identified
checklist.description: commit-plan.md or commit-log.txt shows auth-related files (middleware.js, utils.js, auth.test.js) grouped into a single commit

checklist.name: Payments group identified
checklist.description: commit-plan.md or commit-log.txt shows payments-related files (processor.js, webhook.js, payments.test.js) grouped into a single commit

checklist.name: Infra/CI group identified
checklist.description: The CI config file (.github/workflows/ci.yml) is grouped separately from the feature files

checklist.name: Multiple commits made
checklist.description: commit-log.txt shows at least 2 commits beyond the initial commit (feature changes are not lumped into a single commit)

checklist.name: Conventional commit type: feat
checklist.description: The auth and payments commits use the `feat` type prefix (e.g., `feat(auth):` or `feat(payments):`)

checklist.name: Conventional commit type: chore
checklist.description: The CI pipeline commit uses `chore` type prefix (e.g., `chore(infra):` or `chore(config):`)

checklist.name: Scope is short and logical
checklist.description: All commit message scopes are short names (1-2 words like `auth`, `payments`, `infra`, `config`) — not full file paths or long phrases

checklist.name: Action verb in description
checklist.description: Each commit message description starts with an action verb (add, fix, remove, update, refactor, extract, or similar)

checklist.name: No file listing in messages
checklist.description: No commit message enumerates individual file names (e.g., does NOT say 'middleware.js, utils.js, auth.test.js')

checklist.name: Line length ≤ 72 chars
checklist.description: All lines in all commit messages visible in commit-log.txt are ≤ 72 characters long

checklist.name: git log shown at end
checklist.description: commit-log.txt contains output of git log --oneline showing the commits made in this session
